interaction_phrase: launched in 2019 by Amazon Web Services (AWS)
occurrence_sentence: [Amazon Braket](https://aws.amazon.com/), launched in 2019 by Amazon Web Services (AWS), is a fully managed quantum computing service that provides researchers, developers, and enterprises with unified, on-demand access to a broad array of quantum hardware technologies and simulation tools.

Braket supports a diverse set of hardware from leading providers, including superconducting systems from Rigetti Computing, Oxford Quantum Circuits, neutral atom from QuEra, ion-trap systems from IonQ, quantum annealers from D-Wave, and photonic devices from Xanadu.
